mapper.sql: index_id, park_key, park_name,scenic_name, park_latitude, park_longitude, park_add, park_tel, park_linkman, park_freetime, park_freetime_out, charge_sdesc, reserve_status, reg_time, valid_time, space_total, city_short_name, car_type_charg_rules, parkqrcode_url ,create_time,update_time,warning_time
mapper.insert:
insert into get_park_info (index_id, park_key, park_name,scenic_name, park_latitude, park_longitude, park_add, park_tel, park_linkman, park_freetime, park_freetime_out, charge_sdesc, reserve_status, reg_time, valid_time, space_total, city_short_name, car_type_charg_rules, parkqrcode_url ,create_time,update_time ) values
( #{item.indexId}, #{item.parkKey}, #{item.parkName}, #{item.scenicName}, #{item.parkLatitude}, #{item.parkLongitude}, #{item.parkAdd}, #{item.parkTel}, #{item.parkLinkman}, #{item.parkFreetime}, #{item.parkFreetimeOut}, #{item.chargeSdesc}, #{item.reserveStatus}, #{item.regTime}, #{item.validTime}, #{item.spaceTotal}, #{item.cityShortName}, #{item.carTypeChargRules}, #{item.parkqrcodeUrl}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateTime} )
on duplicate key update space_total = values(space_total), park_freetime = values(park_freetime), park_freetime_out = values(park_freetime_out), park_linkman = values(park_linkman), update_time = sysdate()
